executives.name: Ian Cockerill
executives.background: Ian Cockerill has over 45 years of experience in the global natural resources industry. He previously served as CEO of Gold Fields and Anglo Coal, and as a non-executive director of BHP and Ivanhoe Mines. He was the Chair of Endeavour Mining before being appointed CEO in January 2024.

executives.name: Guy Young
executives.background: Guy Young has over 25 years of experience in financial and operational roles. He was previously the CFO of Anglo American Platinum and has held various senior roles within the Anglo American Group.

executives.name: Mark Morcombe
executives.background: Mark Morcombe has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining Endeavour, he was the COO of Centamin plc and held senior roles at AngloGold Ashanti and Acadian Mining.

executives.name: Morgan Carroll
executives.background: Morgan Carroll has over 20 years of experience in the mining and finance sectors. He previously worked at La Mancha and in investment banking at Lazard.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Corporate Finance and General Counsel

executives.name: Sébastien de Montessus
executives.background: Former President and CEO. He was terminated for cause in January 2024 following an investigation into an irregular payment instruction.

board_of_directors.name: Srinivasan Venkatakrishnan
board_of_directors.background: Venkat has over 30 years of experience in the mining sector. He was previously the CEO of Vedanta Resources plc and AngloGold Ashanti Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Alison Baker
board_of_directors.background: Alison Baker has over 25 years of experience in the provision of audit, advisory and capital markets services. She was a partner at PwC and EY.

board_of_directors.name: Cathia Lawson-Hall
board_of_directors.background: Cathia Lawson-Hall has over 25 years of experience in the financial sector, notably at Société Générale where she was Head of Coverage and Investment Banking for Africa.

board_of_directors.name: Livia Mahler
board_of_directors.background: Livia Mahler has over 30 years of experience in the venture capital and mining sectors. She is the co-founder and CEO of Computational Geosciences Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Tertius Zongo
board_of_directors.background: Tertius Zongo served as the Prime Minister of Burkina Faso from 2007 to 2011 and has held several ministerial positions.

board_of_directors.name: Patrick de Saint-Aignan
board_of_directors.background: Patrick de Saint-Aignan has over 40 years of experience in the financial services industry, primarily at Morgan Stanley.

board_of_directors.name: Naguib Sawiris
board_of_directors.background: Naguib Sawiris is the Chairman of Orascom TMT Investments S.à r.l. and has extensive experience in the telecommunications and mining sectors.
